name: [GRIDHAND] Industry Specialist Agent - Auto repair: vehicle due for oil change (6 months) → proacti

gridhand.scenario: Auto repair: vehicle due for oil change (6 months) → proactive SMS
gridhand.description: When a vehicle's oil change is due in six months, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a proactive SMS to the vehicle owner through the shop's preferred messaging app, such as Twilio or Nexmo, to remind them of the upcoming maintenance need. This workflow is time-sensitive, as it allows the auto repair shop to book appointments in advance, ensuring a steady stream of customers and preventing last-minute scheduling hassles. By delivering timely reminders, the business owner can increase customer retention and loyalty, while also maintaining a consistent flow of revenue-generating oil change services.
